nasb.text: For indeed we are in danger of being accused of a riot in connection with today’s events, since there is no real cause for it, and in this connection we will be unable to account for this disorderly gathering.”

esv.text: For we really are in danger of being charged with rioting today, since there is no cause that we can give to justify this commotion.”

cnv.text: 今天的動亂，本來是無緣無故的，我們可能有被控告的危險；關於這次的騷動，我們實在無法解釋。”

ccb.text: 今天的骚乱实在没有道理，难免会被查问，到时候我们很难交代。”

csbs.text: 关于今天的事，本来没有正当的理由，我们实际上就有被控告为暴乱的危险。我们无法对这次骚动做出交代。”
